chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-6136 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 28.08.2025 Mr. Rajesh Kumar, advocate for the respondent No.4 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General --------- This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 15.12.2022, which is almost two and half years ago. Since then, the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Despite the lapse of two and half years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
